summary: CRM UI/UX Redesign - All tests passed. Frontend: 100% success rate. All pages (Login, Dashboard, Customers, Inspections, Admin, Finance) display correctly with modern design matching FinancePage style guide. Navigation, modals, and forms work correctly.
passed_tests: Login page displays with split-screen design (gradient left, form right)
Login page shows demo credentials section
Login form elements present (email, password, button, remember me)
Login functionality works with CEO credentials (ceo@wisedrive.com / password123)
Login functionality works with HR Manager credentials (hr@wisedrive.com / password123)
Dashboard page loads with summary cards (Total Leads, Customers, Inspections, Team Members)
Dashboard shows Quick Actions section with Manage Leads, Inspections, Customers
Dashboard shows Recent Activity feed
Dashboard shows Performance Overview with progress bars
Dashboard shows additional stats row (Today's Inspections, This Month Revenue, Conversion Rate)
Quick Action 'Manage Leads' navigates to /leads
Quick Action 'Inspections' navigates to /inspections
Quick Action 'Customers' navigates to /customers
TopNavbar displays correctly with logo and navigation links (Leads, Customers, Inspections, Admin, Settings, Finance)
TopNavbar shows user info and logout button
Customers page displays with modern table design
Customers page shows summary cards (Total Customers, Payments Completed, Payments Pending)
Customers page has search input and city filter
Add Customer modal opens and closes correctly
Add Customer modal has form fields (name, mobile, city, payment status)
Inspections page displays with summary cards
Inspections page has Unscheduled/Scheduled tabs
Inspections page tabs switch correctly and show different data
Inspections page shows modern data table with status badges
Admin page displays with summary cards (Total Employees, Active Employees, Mechanics, Countries)
Admin page has Employees/Countries tabs
Admin page Employees tab shows employee table with role badges, status, weekly off, salary info
Admin page Countries tab shows country list with currency info
Admin page has Add Employee and Add Country buttons
Finance page (style guide) still works and displays correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign complete. All pages now match FinancePage design language with: 1) Gradient buttons (blue-600 to blue-700), 2) Modern rounded cards with shadows, 3) Status badges with colored backgrounds, 4) Clean tables with hover effects, 5) Split-screen login design, 6) Consistent typography and spacing. All existing functionality preserved.

design_verification.Login Page: Split-screen design with gradient left panel (blue-900 to blue-700), white form card on right, demo credentials section, feature pills
design_verification.Dashboard: Summary cards with icons, Quick Actions with gradient icons, Recent Activity feed, Performance Overview with progress bars, colored stats row at bottom
design_verification.Customers Page: Summary cards, search/filter section, modern table with avatar initials, status badges, pagination
design_verification.Inspections Page: Summary cards, Unscheduled/Scheduled tabs, different table layouts per tab, status badges with icons
design_verification.Admin Page: Summary cards, Employees/Countries tabs, employee table with role badges and status indicators, countries table with currency symbols
design_verification.TopNavbar: Gradient background (blue-900 to blue-800), logo, navigation links, user avatar, logout button
